Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers across all process variants
Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur before SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' occurs

Name: Percentage of process variants in which SW-AE Assign Reviewers appears at least once
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers compared to the frequency of SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are immediately followed by another SW-AE Assign Reviewers (indicating reassignment attempts)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that precede a successful SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurring after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept versus those leading to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers per case on average in the entire log
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in relation to the total number of activities in the SW (Standard Workflow) track
Percentage of cases where SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurs more than three times, indicating prolonged reviewer assignment challenges
Metric: the average of the function base > 3 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers out of all reviewer assignment-related activities (e.g., RW-AE Assign Reviewers, RSW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'RW-AE Assign Reviewers' or activity == 'RSW-AE Assign Reviewers'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur in variants containing Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are followed within 7 days by SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Declined' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer No Response'"}"
